title: crotalaria retusa var. retusa
intro: Crotalaria retusa var. retusa, also known as the 'Rattlepod', is a plant species within the legume family Fabaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various ailments due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential use as a natural remedy for malaria. Crotalaria retusa var. retusa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat these conditions.
